messages.subject: [R-sig-genetics] Calculation of Queller and Goodnight relatedness	in R:
messages.subject_clean: Calculation of Queller and Goodnight relatedness	in R:
messages.body_plain:
Nevil Amos <nevil.amos at ...> writes:

> 
> Do any of the genetics related packages allow calcualtion of individual 
> relatedness values?
> 
> such as that in Queller, D.C. and Goodnight, K.F. 1989. Estimation of 
> genetic relatedness using allozyme data. Evolution 43:258-275.?
> 
> cheers
> 
> Nevil Amos
> 
> 	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
> 


Hi Nevil,

I am also looking to an R package that calculate Q-G relatedness. Have you find
any? I need to calculate R for many populations and different points in time,
and doing it on Kingroup takes too much time.

Thanks!
